subheadline: See what changes when you stop maintaining a homegrown stack and adopt a platform built for it.
left_description: A do-it-yourself stack works until it doesn't. The hidden cost is the engineering time it quietly eats every quarter.

left_points.text: Two engineers tied up on maintenance

right_description: Ship the same outcome in days, then let our team handle uptime, security, and scale while yours builds product.

right_points.text: SOC 2 Type II out of the box
